mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sw_industry (index_code, index_name, level, parent_code, src) VALUES
(#{item.indexCode}, #{item.indexName}, #{item.level}, #{item.parentCode}, #{item.src})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sw_industry WHERE level = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT index_code FROM sw_industry GROUP BY index_code HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT index_name) > 1 ) t
